name: Configuration error (safe mode)
description: Shown when frame.yaml or screens.yaml fail validation. Displays safe-mode status from the device API and structured validation errors when available.

theme.description: Color scheme. Auto follows the device/OS preference.

font_family.description: Typeface for headings and body copy.

accent_color.description: Accent for the alert icon and emphasis. Leave empty for theme destructive color.

show_validation_details.description: Show structured validation error details (field paths and messages) when available.
